voice.tone: Concise and helpful. Like a knowledgeable colleague.
voice.errors: Brief and actionable. Show what went wrong and how to retry. Never verbose.
voice.loading: Ghost text shimmer for suggestions. Subtle pulse animation on the copilot icon. Typing indicator dots for AI responses.
voice.empty_states: Quiet and inviting. An empty copilot panel shows a subtle prompt to ask a question or start a task. No clutter.
